title: EQ - Select a value, close the Settings screen, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting persists correctly after navigating away from and back to Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Navigate back to Device Settings (e.g., press back or close the Equalizer screen)
Close the Settings screen and return to Home
Navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer
Verify the previously selected EQ value is still selected
Repeat steps 5–10 for each remaining EQ value: Flat, Bright, Custom EQ
expected: The previously selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and is correctly displayed as selected after navigating away from and back to the Equalizer settings.
